open_conditions_carried_forward: #65 E1/E2: H3b divergence + H3c opposite direction deferred to G2 methodology page.

E3 geo-DS C2 (non-blocking): C5 note for D3 dynamism maps/narratives (before G2).
spatial-methods.md domain C1: Gi* = amenity-change hotspot label in G2.
R-A9 geo-DS: ewr_composite for lor_2021 when EWR join extended; LISA FDR note for G2.
R-A9 domain: HL LISA label nuance; diffusion causal limits; D5 missing (Epic D).
#115 EWR H2/H3: POI pseudo-replication caveat (35% PLRs share poi_count). p-values inflated. For G2.

#117 B7 geo-DS C-1..C-4 + domain D-1..D-5: MSS H3a/H3b = co-movement only; pre-2021 H3 single-pair caveat; ewr_composite not cross-vintage comparable; C5 attenuation note; migration 2017 break; uninhabited count per edition.
#119 B9 geo-DS C-1/C-2/C-3 + domain D-1/D-2/D-3: partial composite std ~10% higher; no foreigners/migration claims pre-2014; E1 must filter any_endpoint_partial=FALSE; public label required.

ADR-0014 open questions (Hamburg): exact WFS feature-type/CSV schemas (Medium confidence, DE probes at ingestion); 943→941 statistische-Gebiete crosswalk; Wohndauer fine-grain availability (hands-on probe, no paid fallback if absent); Soziale-Erhaltungsverordnung in-force-date attribute; two-grain social-pillar reconciliation is methodology-bearing — needs geo-DS+domain sign-off when H1's actual models are built (not yet — ADR only set the source contract).
